label: Strategy Config
description: View and edit configuration for active DeFi strategies including allocation targets, rebalance rules, and risk limits.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2/0.3 requiredEntitlements/availableOn non-empty.

0.6.note: /0.7/0.8: added client-side hydration skeleton (Skeleton component), empty state when no strategies registered, and error state for localStorage load failures.

0.7.note: /0.8: added client-side hydration skeleton (Skeleton component), empty state when no strategies registered, and error state for localStorage load failures.

0.8.note: client-side hydration skeleton (Skeleton component), empty state when no strategies registered, and error state for localStorage load failures.

0.9.note: no dead code (mode state value is used for badge variant).

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Fixed 0.6/0.7/0.8: added client-side hydration skeleton (Skeleton component), empty state when no strategies registered, and error state for localStorage load failures. 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2/0.3 requiredEntitlements/availableOn non-empty. 0.4 no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 no lib/mocks imports. 0.9 no dead code (mode state value is used for badge variant).

1.1.note: Widget is a pure config form that reads from defi-strategy-store (localStorage-backed) rather than useDeFiData() — correct for a form widget with no server data.

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() at line 188 of defi-data-context.tsx. 1.3-1.5 Context filters tradeHistory by scopeStrategyIds and adjusts token balances/lending protocols by hasDefiDesk org filter — cascade is correct. N/A for this widget directly since it does not consume context data.

1.3.note: 1.5 Context filters tradeHistory by scopeStrategyIds and adjusts token balances/lending protocols by hasDefiDesk org filter — cascade is correct. N/A for this widget directly since it does not consume context data.

1.5.note: Context filters tradeHistory by scopeStrategyIds and adjusts token balances/lending protocols by hasDefiDesk org filter — cascade is correct. N/A for this widget directly since it does not consume context data.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays → context returns unfiltered data (hasDefiDesk defaults to true when organizationIds.length === 0).

1.7.note: Widget imports from lib/config/strategy-config-schemas and lib/stores/defi-strategy-store — no lib/mocks imports. Context imports mocks from lib/mocks/fixtures/ which is acceptable for the context layer (mock data source, not widget-level imports).

l1.notes: 1.1 Widget is a pure config form that reads from defi-strategy-store (localStorage-backed) rather than useDeFiData() — correct for a form widget with no server data. 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() at line 188 of defi-data-context.tsx. 1.3-1.5 Context filters tradeHistory by scopeStrategyIds and adjusts token balances/lending protocols by hasDefiDesk org filter — cascade is correct. N/A for this widget directly since it does not consume context data. 1.6 Empty scope arrays → context returns unfiltered data (hasDefiDesk defaults to true when organizationIds.length === 0). 1.7 Widget imports from lib/config/strategy-config-schemas and lib/stores/defi-strategy-store — no lib/mocks imports. Context imports mocks from lib/mocks/fixtures/ which is acceptable for the context layer (mock data source, not widget-level imports).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch ✓ — config view/edit available in all modes.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but scope.mode not consumed by widget. Config form shows regardless of mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: config editing shown; submit handlers include paper/live path via handleSubmit.

4.1.note: Save Config, Cancel buttons have onClick handlers. No dead buttons.

5.1.note: Target strategies: YIELD_ROTATION_LENDING, CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED, MARKET_MAKING_CONTINUOUS, ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION — strategy config applies to all active DeFi strategies.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. Data via useDeFiData().

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: visibleSeries useMemo, toggleStrategy useCallback — stable deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px] at lines 97, 125, 164, 182 migrated to text-micro; text-[9px] at line 183 migrated to text-nano. text-[11px] at lines 187, 219 remains — no 11px token in scale (nearest are text-nano 9px and text-xs 12px); product decision required.

8.3.note: FormWidget, CollapsibleSection, Badge, Button, Input, Select from shared components.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Human: keyboard pass required.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred pending --text-label-micro/nano tokens. 8.5: human resize test required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Strategy config is a distinct operational form — not a detail of any action widget.

dataContract.notes: Config load on mount; save on submit. Strategy config changes require backend persistence.

gaps.notes: Config save path is mock-only — no backend endpoint wired.

findings.description: 0.6 Loading state missing — widget called loadInitialConfigs() synchronously in useState initializer, no SSR/hydration skeleton
0.7 Empty state missing — no guard when ALL_DEFI_IDS is empty (no strategies registered)
0.8 Error state missing — no handler if localStorage read throws
1.1 Widget does not use useDeFiData() hook — intentional: this is a pure config/form widget backed by defi-strategy-store (localStorage). N/A for context data flow.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: defi-strategy-config-widget.tsx:97,125,164,182 text-[10px]; :183 text-[9px]; :187,219 text-[11px] for dense label sizing.
findings.deferReason: text-[10px] migrated to text-micro and text-[9px] migrated to text-nano; text-[11px] at :187,219 remains — no 11px token in scale (nearest are text-nano 9px and text-xs 12px); product decision required for 11px resolution

findings.description: defi-strategy-config-widget.tsx:188-204 — Client Config panel has hardcoded display strings ('OKX, Bybit, Binance', 'HyperLiquid' line-through, 'ETH only', 'Multi-coin: Locked'). These do not vary with the selected strategy or org; they are placeholder UI copy.
findings.proposedFix: Source allowed venues from CLIENTS[orgId].venues (already exists in lib/config/services/clients.config.ts) and asset filters from the strategy's LendingArbStrategyConfig.allowedAssets. Treat as display-facts keyed on scope, not placeholder literals.

findings.description: defi-strategy-config-widget.tsx:211-217 — Risk Indicators panel has six fully hardcoded rows (Oracle Depeg 0.12%, Borrow-Staking Spread +1.4%, USDT Peg $1.0002, Withdrawal Delay 7d, Est. Rebalance Cost $420, Est. Full Close Cost $2,800). Values do not change with selectedStrategy, do not derive from protocolParams, and are not wired to emergencyExit.
findings.proposedFix: Derive rebalance/close cost from emergencyExit estimates already exposed by useDeFiData(). Oracle depeg + USDT peg + spread should flow from healthFactorDashboard (oracle_market_gap_pct, net_spread_pct). Withdrawal delay belongs in LENDING_PROTOCOLS per asset. Replace the literal array with a memo that reads from context.

findings.description: defi-strategy-config-widget.tsx:263 — 'Promote' button fabricates runId with Math.floor(Math.random() * 9000) + 1000 and shows a success toast without calling any API. Misleading — no promotion actually happens.
findings.proposedFix: Either remove the button until a backtest-promotion API exists, or wire it to the promote service. Random-numbered toasts are worse than disabled buttons because they imply a real action.
